metas.name: Kusuriya no Hitorigoto 3rd Season
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Historical, Medical, Mystery
In the aftermath of the Shi Clan's rebellion, things have finally settled down, and Maomao has returned to her old life as a pharmacist in the pleasure district. One day, triggered by a breakfast served at the Verdigris House, Maomao senses an anomaly and begins investigating its true nature. Meanwhile, Jinshi, who has revealed his true identity as the Imperial brother and begun to face his heavy responsibilities, is deeply troubled by the final message left by Loulan: a warning of an impending "disaster that will strike the nation." To make matters worse, rumors of a mysterious shrine maiden who deceives the people begin to spread, casting a dark shadow over the country of Li once again. From the depths of the inner court to the city streets, and across foreign borders—the world grows wider, and the stakes even higher for Maomao and Jinshi.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

metas.name: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners II
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Gore, Sci-Fi
Sequel to  Cyberpunk: Edgerunners.

Genres: Love Polygon, Romance, School, Shounen, Sports, Team Sports

Genres: Drama, Historical, Medical, Mystery
Original Kusuriya no Hitorigoto movie.

Sequel to Tokyo Revengers: Tenjiku-hen.

metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Romance, School, Supernatural
Sequel to Seishun Buta Yarou wa Santa Claus no Yume wo Minai.

metas.name: Kikansha no Mahou wa Tokubetsu desu 2nd Season
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, School, Time Travel
Second season of Kikansha no Mahou wa Tokubetsu desu.

metas.name: Tensei Kizoku, Kantei Skill de Nariagaru 3rd Season
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Isekai, Reincarnation
Third season of Tensei Kizoku, Kantei Skill de Nariagaru.

metas.name: Aoashi 2nd Season
metas.description:
Genres: Seinen, Sports, Team Sports
Second season of Ao Ashi.

metas.name: Sasaki to Pii-chan Season 2
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Isekai
Second season of Sasaki to Pii-chan.

metas.name: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Martial Arts, Shounen
Dragon Ball Super: Beerus, a project that was started a few years ago, is the newly ENHANCED edition of the anime Dragon Ball Super. ENHANCED by the latest visual expression, every scene, especially the battle scenes, is even more immersive, providing a more faithful and detailed reproduction of the original work by Akira Toriyama, and it will deliver a quality that is sure to fully satisfy audiences.

(Source: Official website)

metas.name: Hotaru no Yomeiri
metas.description:
Genres: Historical, Romance
Satoko, the eldest daughter of the honorable Kirigaya family, has received many marriage proposals from men captivated by her beauty and grace. However, she has turned them all down due to her secret heart defect. Despite her condition, Satoko is still willing to find a husband to ease her beloved father's concerns.

While on a stroll, Satoko is kidnapped by a group of mercenaries, one of them being Shinpei Gotou—a legendary assassin tasked with executing her. Satoko tries to bribe Gotou into freeing her, but it proves unsuccessful. Out of options, Satoko makes a desperate gamble: under the pretense of love at first sight, she asks him to marry her.

Unexpectedly, Gotou takes the bait and vows to protect her. As the couple escapes to freedom, Satoko struggles to keep up the ruse and make sense of the mysterious man she has eloped with.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

metas.name: Tougen Anki: Nikko・Kegon no Taki-hen
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, Mythology, Shounen
Sequel of Tougen Anki.

metas.name: Girls und Panzer: Saishuushou 5
metas.description:
Genres: CGDCT, Military, School
The fifth film in the six-part Girls & Panzer: Saishuushou film series.

metas.name: Hyouken no Majutsushi ga Sekai wo Suberu II
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, School
Second season of Hyouken no Majutsushi ga Sekai wo Suberu.

metas.name: Tensei shita Dai Seijo wa, Seijo de Aru Koto wo Hita Kakusu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Reincarnation
Fia always dreamed of becoming a knight. Born into a family of knights, she's the least talented among them, but she still clutches to her hope and trains with everything she has. When the day comes for her to slay a small demon and prove her worth, she ends up face to face with a dragon instead! A deadly injury makes her life flash before her eyes... and she suddenly remembers her former life, when she was a powerful Saint in a bygone era who defeated the Demon King. That life ended in pain because of who she was, making her fear ever becoming a Saint again. Now that the magic from her previous life has been rekindled, she may become a more powerful knight than she ever dreamed–if only she can survive long enough!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Magic Knight Rayearth (2026)
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Isekai, Shoujo
New anime project for Magic Knight Rayearth to celebrate the anime's 30th anniversary.

metas.name: Rakuen Tsuihou: Kokoro no Resonance
metas.description:
Genres: Mecha, Sci-Fi
Sequel to Rakuen Tsuihou.

metas.name: Mahou Shoujo Ikusei Keikaku: restart
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Gore, High Stakes Game, Mahou Shoujo, Survival, Suspense
The deadly game is back!

Once again, sixteen Magical Girls have been assembled for a high-stakes challenge. Every three days, their Magical Phone pulls them into an RPG-like simulation where they have to work together to fight enemies, solve puzzles, and earn Magical Candy to advance. A staggering ten billion yen reward awaits them at the end—but only for the players who land the finishing blow. With such a tantalizing prize on the line, it's only a matter of time before the girls turn on each other—and if their hit points drop to zero, a game over will be the least of their worries... 

(Source: Mahou Shoujo Ikusei Keikaku Wiki, edited)

metas.name: PSYЯEN
metas.description:
Genres: Action, High Stakes Game, Psychological, Romance, Sci-Fi, Shounen, Strategy Game, Super Power, Supernatural, Suspense
Ageha Yoshina is a self-confident high school student who helps others for a fee. On his way back from a job, he finds a strange calling card with the word "Psyren" imprinted left behind in a phone booth and decides to keep it, unaware of its purpose. The very next day, Ageha discovers that his classmate Sakurako Amamiya has the exact same calling card in her possession. When he questions her, Sakurako asks him to save her, signaling the day his troubles begin.

Confused by the circumstances of this encounter, Ageha realizes something is wrong when Sakurako goes missing. In an attempt to figure out what is happening, he decides to call the number provided on the calling card and is asked a series of questions by a mysterious voice, ending with a final, cryptic question: "Would you like to go to Psyren?" Thus begins two teenagers' participation in a game of life or death within a strange world inhabited by monsters called Taboo. Granted the ability to use psychic powers known as PSI, the duo fight to return to the place they call home.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

metas.name: Toaru Anbu no ITEM
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, Sci-Fi, Super Power, Urban Fantasy
In Academy City, where supernatural abilities are part of everyday science, the city's peace is upheld by an unseen force—the dark side. Among the covert operatives is ITEM, a four-member elite unit. With Rikou Takitsubo's tracking abilities, Frenda Seivelun's explosive expertise, Saiai Kinuhata's impenetrable defense, and Shizuri Mugino's overwhelming power as one of Academy City's seven Level 5 espers, they navigate the city's underbelly, taking on secret missions that never make the headlines.

As their latest assignment unfolds, the team moves with precision, unaware that their actions are setting the stage for a tragedy that will test their bonds of trust, friendship, and survival in the unforgiving darkness of Academy City.

(Source: MAL News)

metas.name: Kyouran Reijou Nia Liston
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy, Reincarnation
Lying on her deathbed with seemingly no chance at recovery, a young Nia Liston is soon to succumb to her illness. Unable to give up hope, her parents desperately search for a cure in even the most obscure places, leading to the appearance of a hooded man claiming he can help rid Nia of her condition. But rather than curing her, the hooded man transplants the soul of a deceased hero who was undefeated in battle into the girl's frail body.

Given a second chance at life as Nia, the hero is determined to recover her new body's strength by using a technique known as chi to target and eliminate the illness at its roots. With her enthusiastic hunger for combat having also been carried over, Nia is eager to return to exploring the world. However, the hero's restless soul yearns to find a worthy opponent who can defeat her on the battlefield, sparking chaos wherever Nia may go.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

metas.name: Mezametara Saikyou Soubi to Uchuusen-mochi datta node, Ikkodate Mezashite Youhei to shite Jiyuu ni Ikitai
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Isekai, Sci-Fi, Space
Sato Takahiro was an ordinary office worker and hobbyist gamer until the day he woke up on a spaceship–one that strangely resembled a craft from a favorite space-shooter game. With a decked-out ship, a crew full of babes, and a fantastic universe to explore, he's going to make the most of his good luck and create the life he's always dreamed of!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai Sareta Majo desu.
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy, Josei, Romance
Deep within the forest, a cozy and rather cluttered cottage sits on the lakeshore, housing a mysterious, feared witch. In truth, she is a lovely young woman named Rose, who has learned the art of potion-making from her wise grandmother. Rose cherishes her tucked-away life, yet there is a longing in her heart—for a handsome knight she once saw, Sir Harij Azm.

For four years, Rose's feelings for Harij have lingered, but she can never act on them; witches live outside of human affairs and belong to no country or man. So, when Harij suddenly appears on her doorstep looking for a love potion, Rose is both surprised and heartbroken. Although another woman has captured the noble knight's heart, Rose decides to help him. But before crafting the potion, Rose sends Harij on a series of ridiculous quests for each ingredient, hoping to delay the inevitable and savor their fleeting time together.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

metas.name: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Romance
Koharu Satou is known to her classmates as the "unattainable flower" a cold and distant girl whose refusal to smile keeps everyone at arm's length.

However, Souta Oshio accidentally stumbles upon Satou's secret at her family's cafe. It turns out the "icy Satou-san" is actually an incredibly shy and clumsy girl who struggles even with something as simple as taking photos of sweets for the cafe's social media.

Bonding over their shared love for cameras and desserts, the distance between the two gradually shrinks. This charming romantic comedy follows two socially awkward people as they navigate their feelings in a story that is as sweet as it is endearing.

(Source: MAL News)

metas.name: Shuiro no Kamen
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, Seinen
The mask brings calamity. The mask revels in slaughter. The mask has a will of its own... Pelle, a traveling mask merchant, possesses the ability to craft mysterious masks that give its wearers unique powers. In a city shrouded in an eerie atmosphere, he encounters Sonah, a mysterious young girl. As revelations unfold and inner conflicts arise, a young boy takes his first steps forward! Immerse yourself in a thrilling mask battle fantasy!

(Source: Orange Inc.)

metas.name: Yowaki MAX Reijou Nano ni, Ratsuwan Konyakusha-sama no Kake ni Notte Shimatta
metas.description:
Genres: Isekai, Romance, Shoujo, Villainess
I was reborn as a villainous daughter in a reverse harem otome game.

After being sick with a high fever at the age of 10, Pia Rockwell suddenly remembered her past life as a university student in Japan. But far from going down the villainess route, all this super timid girl wants is to finally use her knowledge from when she was a grad student studying to get her doctorate in paleontology. Her ultimate goal is to become a commoner, excavate fossils, build a museum, and then become a curator.

So in order to escape the villainess route and avoid being deported by her fiancé during the graduation ball, Pia decides to avoid the upcoming hurt and heartache and asks to break off her engagement to Rufus, the Prime Minister's son.

But will her cunning fiancé let her go that easily?

(Source: MU)

metas.name: Hotel Inhumans 2nd Season
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Drama, Organized Crime
Second season of Hotel Inhumans.

metas.name: Tempal: Item no Chikara
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, Video Game
Shin Youngwoo (a.k.a. Grid), an unlucky man in life and a low-level player in the popular VR game "Satisfy," finds a powerful item that earns him a rare legendary class title: "Pagma's Successor." He's now a skilled blacksmith who can forge unique weapons and equip the game's most powerful gear. Grid resolves to use his new abilities to achieve fame and fortune, but as his very existence begins to stir up trouble in Satisfy, he realizes that life as a legend may be more than he bargained for...

(Source: Tapas Media)

metas.name: #Zombie Sagashitemasu
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Shounen, Survival
Set in a world where 90% of humanity has contracted and died from a deadly, virulent disease, only to rise again as attacking zombies, thirteen years have passed since the "Red Day" of societal collapse. The surviving humans now live away from the big cities, still hoping to reclaim them one day. An entirely new generation, unaware of the pre-Red Day world, is coming into its own.

The story begins when Aki, who has no memories of the world before its fall, escapes her village with her close friends Haru and Natsuki to search for her missing father. As they venture into the outside world, they find themselves surrounded by zombies on all sides! Along the way, they rescue Yuu and Sakura and take refuge in a home improvement store. They regroup, and now the counterattack begins—!!

(Source: Kadokawa, edited)

metas.name: TANK CHAIR: Sensha Isu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Gore, Super Power
Shizuka takes on the most dangerous of assassin jobs, but she's not the one doing the killing. Rather, it's her brother, Nagi, a strong assassin who took a bullet to protect his sister, leaving him in a comatose state and having to use a wheelchair. However, Shizuka has figured out the key to waking her brother up: he must be faced with killing intent! Thus begins a violent journey of recovery, battling the most dangerous foes!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

metas.name: Tsuihou Sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life wo Ouka Suru.: Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" wo Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka wo Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy
Rein, an enchanter who strengthens equipment with his magic, is suddenly expelled from his guild, simply because every piece of gear in the guild has already been enhanced enough. Outraged by the absurd treatment, Rein decides to take back the enormous amount of mana he had poured into their equipment. When he casually channels it into a random copper sword, it transforms into a cheat-level weapon with 10,000 enhancement points!

With zero combat experience but armed with magic that can turn anything into overpowered gear, this enchanter sets off to enjoy a new, carefree life as an adventurer!

(Source: Shochiku)

metas.name: Gensou Suikoden
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy
Anime adaptation of the game Gensou Suikoden II.

metas.name: Kashita Maryoku wa [Revo Barai] de Kyousei Choushuu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy
Lent is part of the up-and-coming party known as the "Skypiercers," and thanks to his unique Gift, he can loan massive amounts of magic to others. No MP? No problem with Lent around! Except, now that his companions have become formidable heroes (thanks to his skill), his usefulness is questioned. Kicked out of the group, Lent is furious...until he discovers a hidden power to his Gift. Now, with his adorably devious fairy partner, he's going to claw back every last scrap of magic from his former party—with interest!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Sekai Saikyou no Majo, Hajimemashita
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy
When Lorna manifests a completely useless ability, she's labeled an embarrassment to her family and kicked out of the house. With no money or food, she's about to hit rock bottom. But then, she figures out how to use her supposedly worthless SSS-Rank skill, "Internet." This cheat-level talent gives her the know-how to gather an unlimited amount of valuable items and easily acquire rare equipment. Armed with godlike knowledge, Lorna's free to do anything she wants! If only she could figure out what "lmfao" means...

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Kizu darake Seijo yori Houfuku wo Komete Season2
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy, Romance
Second season of Kizu darake Seijo yori Houfuku wo Komete.

metas.name: Choujun! Choujou Senpai
metas.description:
Genres: Adult Cast, Comedy, Gag Humor, Shounen, Super Power
In Chinjuku, the city that never sleeps, there is a psychic senior police officer who has powers beyond human comprehension! His name is Meguru Choujou! Along with his judo expert partner Nao Ippongi, this hilarious duo will keep the streets clean by any means necessary!

(Source: MANGA Plus)

metas.name: Junket Bank
metas.description:
Genres: Adult Cast, High Stakes Game, Psychological, Seinen, Strategy Game, Suspense
Karasu Bank is one of Japan's leading banks, boasting the third-highest operating profits in the country. Akira Mitarai is a young employee in his second year at the bank's central branch. His exceptional math skills allow him to instantly spot accounting errors but also make his day-to-day life incredibly boring.

One day, Akira is suddenly transferred to the Special Operations Department's "Appraisal Unit," which he is told is a key department within the bank. Suspicious of his transfer and the unfamiliar department, he is told by his new boss that the bank actually operates a massive underground casino, and that the Appraisal Unit is the department responsible for managing this gambling as well as the gamblers who participate in it. But these gamblers are putting more than just their money on the line, with their very lives serving as collateral to play! Higher risk means higher rewards, but at the top level losing is a death sentence.

Overwhelmed and confused by the strange state of the bank's secret casino, Mitarai meets a mysterious, genius gambler, Shin Mafutsu. Enraptured by Shin's ability to see through his opponents' cheating and emerge victorious, Akira decides to enter the world of life-or-death gambling as Shin's bank representative.

(Source: MAL News)

metas.name: Tensei Goblin Dakedo Shitsumon Aru?
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy, Isekai, Reincarnation, Seinen
Office worker Akira Yagami's altruistic nature usually gets him the short end of the stick. When he dies after saving a kid from oncoming traffic...he reincarnates in another world as a goblin?! Normally, goblins only live for seven days, but Akira's newfound powers let him defy the species' normal life span... and are the key to his path to becoming the strongest goblin ever!

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Tetsuryou! meet with Tetsudou Musume
metas.description:
Genres: Adult Cast, CGDCT, Slice of Life
Misaki, a university student, feeling the weight of everyday life and uncertain about her future, she longs for adventure and something she can be truly passionate about.

At the start of the new day on campus, members of the Travel Train Club (commonly known as the Tetsuryo Club) invite Misaki to join them, as she steps into the world of railways, Misaki's heart beats with excitement for the journey that awaits her.

(Source: MAL News)

metas.name: Shin Tennis no Ouji-sama: U-17 WORLD CUP Kesshou Member Ketteisen
metas.description:
Genres: School, Shounen, Sports
Sequel to Shin Tennis no Oujisama: U-17 World Cup Semifinal.

metas.name: Soukou Kihei Votoms: Haiiro no Hexe
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Mecha, Military, Sci-Fi, Space
New Soukou Kihei Votoms anime, part of the Sunrise 50th Anniversary project.

metas.name: Keroro Gunsou☆
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Parody, Sci-Fi, Shounen
A new Keroro Gunsou from scratch.

metas.name: Oji-san wa Kawaii Mono ga Osuki.
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy
Mitsutaka Oji is a 40-year-old, handsome office worker that is admired by his colleagues. Of course, he has a secret he is trying to hide from everyone: he loves cute things. But with his nephew going to his apartment, Mitsutaka's secret is now in danger!

(Source: MU)

metas.name: Kyoufu Collector
metas.description:
Genres: Horror, Kids, Mystery, Supernatural
The internet is full of creepypastas, cryptid sightings, tales of paranormal activity, and unsolved disappearances. These are mostly rumors and pranks fueled by trolls—entertainment. But the unlucky few learn the hard way that some legends are true. Many of these unfortunate souls are doomed, but their luck may change if they cross paths with the boy in the red hood. He roams from town to town and appears wherever strange things occur. Is he a light in the dark? Or living proof that monsters are all too real...?

(Source: Yen Press)
